_comment: Hand-authored, realistic shape of one real upstream reflection_result_series_dict[date] entry (agent.py:455). Field names/shape match the real dict the LLM's structured JSON output guardrail produces; text content here is fixture-only, not fetched from any real run.

buy_example.summary_reason: Recent price momentum and positive headline sentiment support accumulating a position.

sell_example.summary_reason: Deteriorating headline sentiment and a break below short-term support suggest reducing exposure.

hold_example.summary_reason: Mixed signals with no clear directional edge; maintaining current position.

unexpected_value_example.summary_reason: Some upstream/LLM variance in casing or unexpected categories should not crash the mapper.
